MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Continued To Aug-26-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Defendants Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Deputy City Attorney, Joe Lake of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-4217) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing temporary judge is signed and filed.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Defendants Motion For Sanctions is Granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff's complaint filed 10/3/2017 is dismissed without prejudice. Written order is signed and filed.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis: Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Continued To May-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Attendance At Deposition, Reimbursement For Costs, And Response To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joel Babbs, Tel. No. 1-415-309-8881, Plaintiff appearing in pro per;
Atty. Kate G. Kimberlin, Deputy City Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-554-3847, appearing
for the Defendant.

RULING - The matter was discussed regarding Mr. Babbs is in the process of hiring an attorney and continuing the trial date in this case. The court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Attendance At Deposition, Reimbursement For Costs, And Response To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents - Written responses are due on November 30, 2018 and also to set a date for the Deposition. Trial date has been continued to August 26, 2019. Defendant's counsel to prepare 2 separate orders. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Attendance At Deposition, Reimbursement For Costs, And Response To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Attendance At Deposition, Reimbursement For Costs, And Response To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents.

Continued to October 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 302 Discovery. Judge Pro Tem David Helbraun recuses himself.

Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Murlene Randall, Esq. 415-352-0189 for Plaintiff Joel Babbs who is also present.
Kate Kimberlin, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D. Parties meet and confer in the hallway. At 10:10 am, the courtroom is closed and vacated. At 10:18 am, the Deputy City Attorney is brought back in. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICE OF MURLENE J. RANDLE, ATTY. MURLENE RANDLE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JOEL R. BABBS.

Granted. Mr. Babbs to look for new Counsel immediately. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) The trial is continued to 5/20/19 at 9:30 am in Dept. 206. Parties waive notice. If the previously set trial of the Deputy City attorney goes forward, then the trial on this case must be continued. All deadlines are triggered off the new date. Deputy City Attorney to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
